moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon, is underway, building towards the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals this coming weekend.

angles.name: General buzz
angles.copy: Centre Court drama, strawberries and cream, and the tension building! Who are you backing for the Wimbledon titles this year?

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: As the second week of Wimbledon unfolds, all eyes are on the British hopefuls still in contention. Can they make it to the finals?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix Aftermath
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone wrapped up yesterday, July 5th, with fans still buzzing from the weekend's action.

angles.name: Race highlights
angles.copy: What a weekend at Silverstone! The British Grand Prix delivered all the drama. Who was your driver of the day?

angles.name: Local connection
angles.copy: Silverstone was roaring this weekend! Did you feel the buzz from the British Grand Prix? What an atmosphere!

moments.title: England Men's Cricket vs India
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team continues their white-ball series against India this week, with the 3rd T20I today in Nottingham, followed by more matches leading to the ODI series next week.

angles.name: Match day buzz
angles.copy: Another massive game today for England Men's cricket against India in the 3rd T20I at Trent Bridge! Are you ready for the action?

angles.name: Series outlook
angles.copy: The white-ball series against India is heating up! With the ODIs starting next week, how do you rate England's chances?

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026
moments.blurb: England is currently hosting the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026, with matches ongoing until the final on July 15th.

angles.name: Tournament progress
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is in full swing across England! Who has impressed you most so far?

angles.name: Support England
angles.copy: Our Lionesses are on home soil for the T20 World Cup! Let's get behind them as they chase glory.

moments.title: Wireless Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival returns to Finsbury Park, London, from July 10-12, with Kanye West (Ye) headlining all three nights.

angles.name: Pre-festival hype
angles.copy: London, are you ready? Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park this weekend with Ye headlining! Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Lineup chat
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is just days away! Beyond the headliners, which artists are on your must-see list this year?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes place from July 10-12 in Moseley Park, celebrating innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham festival
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off in Birmingham this Friday. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Genre specific
angles.copy: From classic funk to cutting-edge soul, Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival promises three days of incredible music. What's your favourite era of funk and soul?

moments.title: 2000trees Festival
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a rock and alternative music festival, takes place in Gloucestershire from July 8-11.

angles.name: Rock festival hype
angles.copy: Calling all rock fans! 2000trees Festival starts this Wednesday in Gloucestershire. Who's heading to the fields?

angles.name: Alternative lineup
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of incredible rock and alternative music at 2000trees! What bands are you most excited to catch?

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins with practice days on July 12th at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, leading into the main tournament from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf anticipation
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are heading to Royal Birkdale as The Open Championship practice days begin this Sunday! Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local interest
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is gearing up to host The Open! Are you excited for one of golf's biggest tournaments coming to the UK?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the series finale expected around July 27th.

angles.name: Daily episode chat
angles.copy: Another night in the Love Island villa! What's been the biggest shocker or cutest moment from last night's episode?

angles.name: Fan theories
angles.copy: With the Love Island finale just weeks away, which couples do you think are built to last outside the villa?

moments.title: New ITV Drama 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: The new serial killer drama 'The Dark', starring Eve Myles, premieres on ITV1 and ITVX on July 12th.

angles.name: New drama hype
angles.copy: Get ready for a chilling new drama! 'The Dark' with Eve Myles premieres Sunday on ITV1 and ITVX. Will you be tuning in?

angles.name: Crime thriller appeal
angles.copy: If you love a gripping crime thriller, mark your calendars for 'The Dark' this Sunday. Who's looking forward to a new mystery?

moments.title: 'Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar' S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar' drops on Netflix on July 12th, catching up with the couples and singles from the pods.

angles.name: Reality TV catch-up
angles.copy: The pods are back! 'Love Is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 arrives on Netflix this Sunday. Who's ready for the drama and updates?

angles.name: Post-show life
angles.copy: What happens after the altar? Find out with the new season of 'Love Is Blind: UK' this weekend on Netflix!

moments.title: 'Trying' Season 5 on Apple TV+
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the acclaimed British comedy series 'Trying' premieres on Apple TV+ on July 8th.

angles.name: Comedy series return
angles.copy: Good news for comedy fans! The fifth season of 'Trying' arrives on Apple TV+ this Wednesday. Who's excited to catch up with Nikki and Jason?

angles.name: Streaming recommendation
angles.copy: Need a new binge-watch? 'Trying' Season 5 is out this week. It's heartwarming, funny, and perfect for a mid-week pick-me-up!

moments.title: '7/7: The London Bombings' on BritBox
moments.blurb: The documentary series '7/7: The London Bombings' premieres today, July 6th, on BritBox, offering a look at the tragic events.

angles.name: Important documentary
angles.copy: A significant new documentary, '7/7: The London Bombings', premieres today on BritBox. A somber but important watch.

angles.name: Historical context
angles.copy: Today marks the release of '7/7: The London Bombings' on BritBox. Reflecting on a poignant moment in UK history.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer for The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Birthday shoutout
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the incredible Stewart Copeland, drummer for The Police, who turns 74 on July 16th! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: A true drumming icon! Stewart Copeland of The Police celebrates his birthday next week. His unique style defined an era.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, will celebrate his 30th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Birthday wish
angles.copy: Big birthday coming up for 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings, turning 30 on July 16th! What's your favourite 5SOS song?

angles.name: Fan engagement
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 30th to Luke Hemmings of 5SOS next week! How many years have you been a fan?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Wizkid
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Wizkid, a global icon in Afrobeats and pop, celebrates his 36th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Birthday celebration
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a global music icon! Wizkid turns 36 on July 16th. What's your top track from the Afrobeats star?

angles.name: Music influence
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to Wizkid next week! His influence on Afrobeats and global pop is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday William Bell
moments.blurb: Legendary American soul singer and songwriter William Bell, known for hits like 'You Don't Miss Your Water', turns 87 on July 16th.

angles.name: Soul legend tribute
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the iconic soul singer William Bell on July 16th! What's your favourite of his timeless tracks?

angles.name: Timeless music
angles.copy: A true voice of soul! William Bell celebrates his birthday next week. His music continues to move generations.

moments.title: UK Schools Break for Summer
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now breaking up for the long summer holidays, marking the start of peak holiday season for families.

angles.name: Holiday start
angles.copy: School's out for summer! For many families, the long-awaited summer holidays are officially here. What are your plans?

angles.name: Travel plans
angles.copy: The great summer getaway is underway! If you're heading off on holiday, where are you off to this year?
